mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_seatunnel_streaming_job_metrics_current ( job_instance_id, job_definition_id, engine_job_id, client_id, job_status, read_row_count, write_row_count, read_qps, write_qps, read_bytes, write_bytes, read_bps, write_bps, intermediate_queue_size, lag_count, record_delay, pipeline_count, table_count, last_collect_time_ms, last_collect_time ) VALUES ( #{jobInstanceId}, #{jobDefinitionId}, #{engineJobId}, #{clientId}, #{jobStatus}, #{readRowCount}, #{writeRowCount}, #{readQps}, #{writeQps}, #{readBytes}, #{writeBytes}, #{readBps}, #{writeBps}, #{intermediateQueueSize}, #{lagCount}, #{recordDelay}, #{pipelineCount}, #{tableCount}, #{lastCollectTimeMs}, #{lastCollectTime} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE job_definition_id = VALUES(job_definition_id), engine_job_id = VALUES(engine_job_id), client_id = VALUES(client_id), job_status = VALUES(job_status), read_row_count = VALUES(read_row_count), write_row_count = VALUES(write_row_count), read_qps = VALUES(read_qps), write_qps = VALUES(write_qps), read_bytes = VALUES(read_bytes), write_bytes = VALUES(write_bytes), read_bps = VALUES(read_bps), write_bps = VALUES(write_bps), intermediate_queue_size = VALUES(intermediate_queue_size), lag_count = VALUES(lag_count), record_delay = VALUES(record_delay), pipeline_count = VALUES(pipeline_count), table_count = VALUES(table_count), last_collect_time_ms = VALUES(last_collect_time_ms), last_collect_time = VALUES(last_collect_time), update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
